prompt: A retro late-1990s Japanese personal homepage displayed inside a Windows-era Microsoft Internet Explorer window, captured as a full browser screenshot. The page title bar reads "露夢の探し場 - Microsoft Internet Explorer" and the browser chrome is authentic to classic Internet Explorer, including menu bar, navigation icons, address bar, and status bar. The website itself has a black starfield space background with tiny colorful stars, framed by dotted gold borders and glowing pixel-style decorative boxes. The page header area shows purple Japanese text "秘密の花園へようこそ…" above a large ornate title "露夢の探し場" with the subtitle "Since 1998" in bright blue italic serif text. In the center is a low-polygon 3D anime girl with pink-red hair, blue crop top, dark shorts, white shoulder armor, brown boots, and a neutral front-facing pose. Count 4 game-like character or effect elements around her: 2 flames near the upper left and upper right of the center area, 1 blue pixel-art robot character on the lower left of the center area, and 1 small red-and-white pixel-art character on the lower right of the center area. Count 2 silver metallic hanging capsule ornaments near the upper center left and upper center right. Build the page in a dense old-web layout with 3 main columns. The left column contains 5 boxed sections: 1 navigation box titled "探し物は何ですか？" with exactly 10 star-bulleted blue links, labeled "最新情報", "怪し物掲示板", "ゲームの部屋", "教授の部屋", "ツールの部屋", "音楽の部屋", "絵の部屋", "BBS（掲示板）", "チャット", "リンク集"; 1 visitor counter box reading "あなたは、◯人目の探検者です" with green digital-style digits "003666"; 1 large blue "BBS" banner button with smaller text "掲示板はこちら"; 1 black-and-yellow caution-style "工事中 UNDER CONSTRUCTION" banner with tiny green worker figures; and 1 black banner with red script text "Link" plus blue text "相互リンク大歓迎!!". The center lower area contains 1 large news box with a gold dotted border and magenta heading "最新情報", listing exactly 5 dated update lines: "'99/06/20 新作ゲーム『Evil Heart』UP!! (NEW)", "'99/06/18 裏技『ストⅡ裏ワザ集』追加。", "'99/06/15 ツール『RPGエディタ Ver1.20』UP", "'99/06/10 音楽『MIDIコレクション』追加", "'99/06/05 絵の部屋にて『神秘師の巫女』UP"; below it add the blue link "過去の情報はこちら". The right column contains 5 boxed sections: 1 red warning box headed "◎ 重要なお知らせ ◎" with text "当サイトは違法性を推奨するものではありません。 すべて自己責任でお願いします。"; 1 dark purple box titled "禁断の館" with subtitle "入る勇気はあるか？" and a realistic skull image on the right; 1 purple box titled "露夢の隠し部屋" with the label "PASSWORD" and an empty white password field; 1 recommendations box titled "おすすめサイト" containing exactly 3 stacked banner buttons labeled "夢魔幻の城", "Game Center", and "PLAY ZONE"; and 1 bottom purple mail button labeled "✉ 露夢へメール". Add small footer text centered near the bottom: "※当サイトにあるすべてのデータの無断転載を禁じます。" and beneath it "Since 1998/3/15　露夢の探し場". Make the whole image feel like an authentic nostalgic Geocities-style Japanese web page from 1998–1999: garish colors, beveled buttons, bitmap fonts, glowing borders, amateur HTML layout, MIDI-homepage energy, slightly compressed screenshot quality, and uncanny period-accurate internet aesthetics.
